bird.name: Cloud-forest pygmy owl
bird.summary: The cloud-forest pygmy owl or cloudforest pygmy owl (Glaucidium nubicola) is a short, muscular, small-sized species of owl found throughout…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Cloud-forest pygmy owl
relations.evidence: This potential distribution comprises roughly 2570 km2. This pygmy owl inhabits primary or slightly altered cloud forests in mountainous regions of high rainfall and steep slopes

relations.subject: Cloud-forest pygmy owl
relations.evidence: The species is currently classified as vulnerable globally because it is suspected to be undergoing a rapid population decline within its naturally small distribution range, owing to severe ongoing deforestation. In addition, its probable distributional range is well below 5000 km2, and the population size is preliminarily estimated between only 2500 and 9999 individuals, of which 1500-7000 are mature individuals. It has lost 57% of its global range and 33% of its range in Ecuador
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
